message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor client
participant gateway
participant "developer-service" as devservice
database "devs-db" as devsdb
entity "broker" as broker
participant "planning-service" as planservice
database "planning-db" as plandb

client -> gateway : POST dev
activate gateway
gateway -> devservice : POST dev
activate devservice
devservice -> devsdb : persist
devservice --> gateway : response 201
deactivate devservice
gateway --> client : 201
deactivate gateway

devservice -> broker : emit DevCreated Event

broker -> planservice : consume Event
activate planservice
planservice -> plandb : persist Dev
deactivate planservice

@enduml
```
